title: GabCraft19's Realistic Worldgen
description: discover a realistic and vanilla friendly worldgen
body:
# GabCraft19's Realistic Worldgen
Experience Minecraft like never before – grounded, immersive, and stunningly natural.
This modpack is built for those who love Vanilla gameplay but want a world that feels more realistic, beautiful, and alive.

## Features:
### Realistic World Generation
Powered by Litosphere, explore terrain that mimics real-life geography – from vast mountain ranges to realistic rivers and landforms.

### Lush Biomes & Nature
With Nature’s Spirit, every forest, meadow, and grove is filled with new trees, foliage, and ambiance – all while keeping a Vanilla-inspired look.

### Adventure & Discovery
Dungeons & Taverns adds hand-crafted structures, dungeons, and settlements for you to discover – without breaking the Vanilla vibe.

### Lightweight & Fabric-based
Built for Minecraft 1.21 with Fabric, this modpack stays fast, clean, and compatible with other performance mods.

## Ideal For:
Players who want realistic landscapes without going full fantasy

Builders looking for natural inspiration

Survival players who want more to explore, not more to manage


Explore Build Survive – in a world that finally feels alive.
